scope: v225 consumer readiness handoff snapshot freeze
summary: v226 freezes the v225 readiness handoff into a package-local snapshot so later guard versions can assert the same handoff contract without rebuilding it in the service layer.
guards: OpsShardReadinessV1ContractConsumerReadinessHandoffService delegates to the frozen v225 snapshot
the frozen v225 handoff still references the frozen v220 evidence digest endpoint, fixture, evidence path, and receipt
digest evidence remains exactly the v215-v219 checklist input evidence carried by the v220 digest
handoff guard evidence remains exactly the v221-v224 digest guard receipts
handoff checks remain derived from the frozen digest and preserve the no-start/no-write boundary
